siteInfo.title: Nicholas Bella - Designer & Developer
siteInfo.name: Nicholas Bella
siteInfo.bio: Hello, I am Nicholas and I am a Designer/Developer. I specialize in Scripting, Modeling, GUI design, GFX designs, and graphic designs. My dream is to help people make their dreams come true through creative and technical excellence.
siteInfo.tagline: Designer & Developer | Scripting • Modeling • GUI • Graphics
siteInfo.heroSubtitle: Designer & Developer | Scripting • Modeling • GUI • Graphics

customContent.aboutExtra: I love working on creative projects and helping clients bring their visions to life. With expertise in multiple design and development areas, I can handle projects from concept to completion.
